final:
module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input C,
    input D,
    input E,
    input F,
    input G,
    input H,
    output Y
  wire temp1_(A & B & C) | (D & E & F & G) = (A & B & C) | (D & E & F & G);
  wire temp2_H = H;
  assign Y = temp1_(A & B & C) | (D & E & F & G) | temp2_H;

endmodule
